description: Coding live mutation performance tracking matrix. Every row tracks a boundary authority that must remain default-off and production-mutation-disallowed until explicit canary activation.

rows.label: Gate 2 Relay Path
rows.description: Gate 2 selected sandbox canary response is fully handled by the Python relay path and cannot fall through to TypeScript core-agent.

rows.label: Sandbox Workspace Rollback
rows.description: Sandbox FileCreate/FileEdit/PatchApply produce mutation receipts with rollback/delete receipts. Sandbox root cannot escape workspace root.

rows.label: ToolHost Coding Mutation Receipt
rows.description: Every write-like tool action produces a durable receipt with digest-only public projection.

rows.label: Read-Before-Edit Gate
rows.description: FileEdit/PatchApply must reject operations when no prior read state exists for the target file.

rows.label: Stale Edit Rejection
rows.description: FileEdit/PatchApply must reject stale file versions where the read digest no longer matches the current file.

rows.label: Diff Evidence Gate
rows.description: Diff claims must not be projected as facts without matching evidence from actual git diff output.

rows.label: Test Evidence Gate
rows.description: Test pass/fail claims must not be projected as facts without matching evidence from actual test runner output.

rows.label: Bounded Coding Repair Loop
rows.description: Repair loops must be bounded and must stop/ask when evidence cannot be produced within the budget.

rows.label: Governed Final Projection
rows.description: Final coding output projection is sanitized: no raw paths, no auth tokens, no file contents in public events.

rows.label: Claude Code Comparable Benchmark
rows.description: Benchmark fixture suite measuring coding task performance against Claude Code baselines.
